nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unable to generate creative ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I use a few key words such as 'wind' 'retro' 'fashion' 'abstract poster' to see what an AI comes up with

nodes.label: AI accuracy in numerical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to follow precise instructions
nodes.grounding_span: The AI is not very good, at the moment, at following precise instructions

nodes.label: AI predictability and consistency
nodes.label_negative: AI inconsistency in character and perspective
nodes.grounding_span: if its sequential art, AI isn't great at maintaining character consistency

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: It's usually a back-and-forth collaboration. I go through many iterations

nodes.label: AI as professional development tool
nodes.label_negative: AI skill as unnecessary or stigmatized
nodes.grounding_span: I think the ability to use AI is a skill. That's probably where the industry is heading

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: art community seem to look down upon it at the moment

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm just looking for something that looks interesting

nodes.label: Creative control and precision
nodes.grounding_span: if I want a characters hand to have a certain number of wrist bands, it cannot follow the instructions

nodes.label: Professional competence and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: I feel companies will look for artists who can collaborate efficiently with an AI

nodes.label: Social belonging and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: art community seem to look down upon it at the moment

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I use a few key words...to see what an AI comes up with. It's a pretty fluid process

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: I really struggled to get the AI to only return the sideview perspective. I eventually gave up

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think the ability to use AI is a skill. That's probably where the industry is heading

nodes.label: Isolation due to community resistance
nodes.grounding_span: None of the people I know use AI for designing...I don't usually discuss it with people

nodes.label: Iterative experimentation and trial-and-error
nodes.grounding_span: I start a new conversation and try again. Or I upload the images it generated to a copy different model

nodes.label: Strategic skill development focus
nodes.grounding_span: I keep myself updated on how people construct prompts
